parameters.name: account
parameters.description: The client account (G...) that the client wishes to authenticate with the server.

parameters.name: memo
parameters.description: The memo to attach to the challenge transaction. Only permitted if a Stellar account (G...) is used. The memo must be of type id. Other memo types are not supported.

parameters.name: home_domain
parameters.description: Home domain for SEP-10. Defaults to the server base domain if omitted.

parameters.name: client_domain
parameters.description: Client domain for wallet attribution. Required when SEP-10 client attribution is enabled (default).
